header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Human Resources professional who thrives on keeping operations running accurately, developing people programs grounded in insights, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve employee experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Develop guides and workflows for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, improving program knowledge and reducing {ex|onboarding} time by 75%
Establish {cross|cross-functional} processes and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining {coord|operations} and maintaining data accuracy across platforms
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, boosting {ex|program engagement} and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Manage 20+ programs and 10+ vendors, refining program positioning and {coord|communications strategy} via {data|feedback analysis}
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Facilitated smooth organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Streamlined {ex|onboarding} processes across 3 global locations by conducting gap analyses and clarifying job responsibilities
Assisted in {ex|employee relations} cases, ensuring compliance with local labor laws and confidentiality
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed {ex|engagement} strategies
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and {prog|leadership training}
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and {coord|customer service}, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months

changeLog.note: Tailored for Built In People Ops & Workplace Experience Specialist. Summary identity changed to 'Human Resources professional'. Bullet emphasis: onboarding, process/documentation, HRIS data accuracy, employee relations. InGenius bullets shifted toward Set H (processes, documentation, cross-functional coordination). Vestas shifted to HR variant (HRBP support, ER cases, onboarding gap analysis). Kronos trimmed to 2 bullets (focus on breadth + talent engagement). NextGen trimmed to 3 bullets for page fit. Skills updated to highlight Greenhouse, SAP, Notion per JD's 'Impress us' criteria.
